title: Mac OS missing FlexLexer.h
body:
The issue is a missing path to the `FlexLexer.h` in the cmake scripts.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

```
% make
[  1%] Built target V3PreLex_yy_cpp
[  3%] Built target V3Lexer_yy_cpp
[  3%] Building CXX object src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/V3ParseLex.cpp.o
In file included from <VERILATOR_GIT>/src/V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
<VERILATOR_GIT>/build/src/V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:303:10: fatal error: 'FlexLexer.h' file not found
#include <FlexLexer.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
make[2]: *** [src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/V3ParseLex.cpp.o] Error 1
make[1]: *** [src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/all] Error 2
make: *** [all] Error 2
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
cmake -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=<HOMEBREW_LLVM>/clang++ -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=<HOMEBREW_LLVM>/clang -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=<INSTALL_PATH> -DBISON_EXECUTABLE=<HOMEBREW_BISON>/bin/bison -DFLEX_EXECUTABLE=<HOMEBREW_FLEX>/bin/flex -DFLEX_INCLUDE_DIR=<HOMEBREW_FLEX>/include ..
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
% verilator --version
Verilator 5.004 2022-12-14 rev UNKNOWN.REV
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

MacOS with llvm@16

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

A fix has been implemented this Bug report is done to satisfy the contribution process outlined in the project documents
code_blocks:
% make
[  1%] Built target V3PreLex_yy_cpp
[  3%] Built target V3Lexer_yy_cpp
[  3%] Building CXX object src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/V3ParseLex.cpp.o
In file included from <VERILATOR_GIT>/src/V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
<VERILATOR_GIT>/build/src/V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:303:10: fatal error: 'FlexLexer.h' file not found
#include <FlexLexer.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
make[2]: *** [src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/V3ParseLex.cpp.o] Error 1
make[1]: *** [src/CMakeFiles/verilator.dir/all] Error 2
make: *** [all] Error 2
